title: Design System: Low Ticket Sales Page

display.purpose: Hero headlines, section headings, high-impact statements.

components.name: Shiny CTA Button
components.description: Primary CTA with animated conic gradient border and green gradient background.
components.css: .ds-shiny-cta { border-radius: 9999px; padding: 18px 22px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #22C978, #00A85A); color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 15.5px; text-transform: uppercase; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,168,90,0.28); border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-shiny-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(0,168,90,0.34); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard card with white background and ambient blue shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 24px; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(11,127,232,0.12); box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(11,127,232,0.07); }

components.name: Pill Badge
components.description: Small rounded badge for labels and categories.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 8px 16px; background: #EAF5FF; color: #0B7FE8; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }

narrative.overview: Bold, aggressive sales page converting visitors through urgency, social proof, and direct CTAs.
keyCharacteristics: Aggressive urgency through timers and scarcity

rules.name: The Urgency Rule
rules.body: Red is reserved for time-sensitive elements only.

rules.name: The Green Means Go Rule
rules.body: Green is exclusively for CTAs and success states.
